delay_description: Purchasing property — must complete before go-live

trigger_phrases.phrase: looking to buy Bosworth House Leicester

typical_timeline.notes: Based on 7 timeline signals observed: in progress, unknown, unknown delays at property, end of evaluation period, unknown

how_to_handle_in_meeting.acknowledge_phrase: Of course — until the keys are yours, everything else has to wait.
how_to_handle_in_meeting.timeline_question: Where are you in the purchase process — have you exchanged yet, or are you still in conveyancing?
how_to_handle_in_meeting.reframe_approach: Use the purchase period to prepare everything: income analysis locked in, agreement ready to sign on completion day, setup quote prepared. 'So you can go live within 3 weeks of getting the keys.'
how_to_handle_in_meeting.how_to_keep_engaged: Ask for the expected completion date. Set a re-activation call for 2 weeks before completion. 'I'll call you [date] to get everything lined up so there's no delay.'
how_to_handle_in_meeting.what_to_write_to_monday: Write expected completion date in date_mm2vmj1q. Note: 'PURCH lead — do not offer before exchange. Reactivate 2 weeks before completion.'

conversion_after_delay.drop_off_reason: Insufficient data to determine — fewer than 10 delay entries per type
conversion_after_delay.note: First run — conversion-after-delay rates will improve with more data over time

do_not_attempt_offer_because: Purchase may fall through. Offer before completion creates commitment to an asset the lead doesn't yet own. If purchase collapses, the offer context is awkward.
